name: devops-large
description: Full DevOps and platform engineering team with cost optimization and chaos engineering

agents.name: Site Reliability Engineer
agents.goal: Ensure system reliability, uptime, and observability

agents.name: Infrastructure Engineer
agents.goal: Provision and manage cloud infrastructure using infrastructure-as-code

agents.name: Platform Engineer
agents.goal: Build and maintain internal developer platforms and CI/CD pipelines

agents.name: DevSecOps Engineer
agents.goal: Integrate security scanning and compliance checks into deployment pipelines

agents.name: Cloud Cost Analyst
agents.goal: Monitor cloud spend, identify waste, and recommend cost optimizations

agents.name: Chaos Engineer
agents.goal: Design and run failure injection experiments to improve system resilience
